race.comment: JASON DARREN (2) win record hardly excites but finds a very weak race second-up. Sat on the speed with the 59kg for a tough third over 1150m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Will push forward from the sticky gate and take catching. MEDDLESOME (9) has her hoof on the till after working hard early from the outside gate with a courageous second over 1200m at this track. Drawn out again in what looks an easier race. Each way. IT'S A WRITTEN (12) got well out of her ground and failed to close off with a poor ninth over 1400m here. Assess on the good Maiden win three starts back. Improver. LOVE THAT GIRL (11) won well on debut, before failing to handle the heavy (10) conditions with a disappointing sixth over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Key jockey change and will handle the extra trip.
